control.description-key: Configurable PCF control for adding products to opportunities, quotes, and custom entities

property.name: parentEntityName
property.description-key: The logical name of the parent entity (e.g., opportunity, quote)

property.name: parentRecordId
property.description-key: The GUID of the parent record. May include variant key encoded as guid|variantKey for entities with multiple modes.

property.name: displayMode
property.description-key: Display mode: auto, modal, or fullscreen

property.name: dataOutput
property.description-key: JSON output of staged product lines

property.name: dialogAction
property.description-key: Dialog close signal - set to close after save
